answers: Web3 = decentralized internet built on blockchain. Users own their data, content, and digital assets. No big tech gatekeepers.
Web3 vs Web2: Web2 = platforms own your data (Facebook, Google). Web3 = you own your data, identity, and digital assets.
Web3 components: blockchain, cryptocurrency, NFTs, DAOs (decentralized organizations), DeFi, and decentralized apps (dApps).
Web3 is still early — infrastructure is being built. Current challenges: UX complexity, scalability, and regulatory uncertainty.
